creator: liangtai.s4@gmail.com
text:
Upstream upgrade to v0.2.3.5
Not only the sub-micro version, but also library version are incremented.

As far as I noticed, since library version was changed from libWildMidi.so.1 to so.2,
a link failure would happen on multimedia/qmmp's midi output plug-in if its
WITH_WILDMIDI option is enabled (default).  Of course I'll report, in another
PR, to ask its PORTREVISION should be incremented.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
